{{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[:Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Japanese Kofun |name=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |alternate_name=Takiō Hyakketsu |image=[[File:Takiō Hyakketsu 01.jpg|300px]] |image_caption=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |location={{ill|Oita City|ja|大分市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Oita Prefecture|ja|大分県|12=draft}}, Haneda |coordinates={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_map_size:20000|display=inline,title}} |built=6th century (Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft}}) |historic_site_Historic Site=Designated as a city historic site on January 9, 1974 (Shōwa 49){{Cite web|language=ja|author=Oita City Lifelong Learning Division|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=Oita City's Historic site|publisher=Oita City|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |map_size=75 cave tombs |image=滝尾百穴01.jpg |map={{location map|Japan Oita|map_dot_label=Takiō Hyakketsu
Cave Tomb Cluster|mark=Cave Tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Oita Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster''' (滝尾百穴横穴古墳群) is a cluster of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Cave tombs|ja|横穴墓|1=Cave tomb|12=draft}} dating to the late 6th century during the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft}}, located in {{ill|Oita City|ja|大分市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Oita Prefecture|ja|大分県|12=draft}}, Haneda. It is also referred to simply as '''Takiō Hyakketsu'''. The site has been Historic site as a {{ill|Historic site|ja|史跡|1=Historic site|lt=Historic site of Japan|12=draft}}} by Oita City. == Overview == The tombs are carved into a volcanic ash cliff north of the sports ground at {{ill|Oita City Takiō Junior High School|ja|大分市立滝尾中学校|12=draft}}. A total of 75 tombs of various sizes are arranged in three to four tiers. The lids of the cave tombs have collapsed and no longer remain. The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as {{ill|Yosemune-zukuri|ja|寄棟造|12=draft}}. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|12=draft}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|12=draft}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|12=draft}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|12=draft}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|12=draft}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|12=draft}}, [[Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013). History of Cave Tombs. * [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]][[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]][[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]][[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]][[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]][[Category:qq]] {{draft categories| [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Cave tombs]] [[Category:Clustered tombs]] [[Category:History of Oita City]] [[Category:Kofun in Oita Prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic sites of Oita Prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun period]] [[Category:Japanese burial practices]] [[Category:Corridor-type kofun]] [[Category:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:qq]][[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]][[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]][[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]][[Category:qq]] }} [[ja:滝尾百穴横穴古墳群]] [[ja:大分市]] [[ja:蓮ヶ池横穴群]] [[ja:宮崎市]] [[ja:横穴墓]] [[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]] [[sn:akio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]] [[en:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]] {{Kofun navbar}}

Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Japanese Kofun |name=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |alternate_name=Takiō Hyakketsu |image=[[File:Takiō Hyakketsu 01.jpg|300px]] |image_caption=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |location={{ill|Oita City|ja|大分市|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Oita Prefecture|ja|大分県|12=draft|12=draft}}, Haneda |coordinates={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_map_size:20000|display=inline,title}} |built=6th century (Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}}) |historic_site_Historic Site=Designated as a city historic site on January 9, 1974 (Shōwa 49){{Cite web|language=ja|author=Oita City Lifelong Learning Division|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=Oita City's Historic site|publisher=Oita City|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |map_size=75 cave tombs |image=滝尾百穴01.jpg |map={{location map|Japan Oita|map_dot_label=Takiō Hyakketsu
Cave Tomb Cluster|mark=Cave Tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Oita Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster''' (滝尾百穴横穴古墳群) is a cluster of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Cave tombs|ja|横穴墓|1=Cave tomb|12=draft|12=draft}} dating to the late 6th century during the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|12=draft|12=draft}}, located in {{ill|Oita City|ja|大分市|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Oita Prefecture|ja|大分県|12=draft|12=draft}}, Haneda. It is also referred to simply as '''Takiō Hyakketsu'''. The site has been Historic site as a {{ill|Historic site|ja|史跡|1=Historic site|lt=Historic site of Japan|12=draft|12=draft}}} by Oita City. == Overview == The tombs are carved into a volcanic ash cliff north of the sports ground at {{ill|Oita City Takiō Junior High School|ja|大分市立滝尾中学校|12=draft|12=draft}}. A total of 75 tombs of various sizes are arranged in three to four tiers. The lids of the cave tombs have collapsed and no longer remain. The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as {{ill|Yosemune-zukuri|ja|寄棟造|12=draft|12=draft}}. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|12=draft|12=draft}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|12=draft|12=draft}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|12=draft|12=draft}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|12=draft|12=draft}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|12=draft|12=draft}}, [[Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|12=draft|12=draft}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|12=draft|12=draft}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|12=draft|12=draft}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|12=draft|12=draft}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|12=draft|12=draft}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|12=draft|12=draft}}, [[Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). {{afc comment|1=See [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Japanese Kofun |name=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |alternate_name=Takiō Hyakketsu |image=[[File:Takiō Hyakketsu 01.jpg|300px]] |image_caption=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |location={{ill|Oita City|ja|大分市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Oita Prefecture|ja|大分県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Haneda |coordinates={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_map_size:20000|display=inline,title}} |built=6th century (Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) |historic_site_Historic Site=Designated as a city historic site on January 9, 1974 (Shōwa 49){{Cite web|language=ja|author=Oita City Lifelong Learning Division|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=Oita City's Historic site|publisher=Oita City|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |map_size=75 cave tombs |image=滝尾百穴01.jpg |map={{location map|Japan Oita|map_dot_label=Takiō Hyakketsu
Cave Tomb Cluster|mark=Cave Tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Oita Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster''' (滝尾百穴横穴古墳群) is a cluster of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Cave tombs|ja|横穴墓|1=Cave tomb|qq=draft|qq=draft}} dating to the late 6th century during the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, located in {{ill|Oita City|ja|大分市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Oita Prefecture|ja|大分県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Haneda. It is also referred to simply as '''Takiō Hyakketsu'''. The site has been Historic site as a {{ill|Historic site|ja|史跡|1=Historic site|lt=Historic site of Japan|qq=draft|qq=draft}}} by Oita City. == Overview == The tombs are carved into a volcanic ash cliff north of the sports ground at {{ill|Oita City Takiō Junior High School|ja|大分市立滝尾中学校|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. A total of 75 tombs of various sizes are arranged in three to four tiers. The lids of the cave tombs have collapsed and no longer remain. The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as {{ill|Yosemune-zukuri|ja|寄棟造|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|qq=draft|qq=draft}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, [[Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013). revision.comment: 9 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:滝尾百穴横穴古墳群 up to rev 98185626
revision.text:
{{日本の古墳 |名称=滝尾百穴横穴古墳群 |別名=滝尾百穴 |画像=[[ファイル:滝尾百穴01.jpg|300px]] |画像キャプション=滝尾百穴横穴古墳群 |所在地=[[大分県]][[大分市]]羽田 |位置={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_scale:20000|display=inline,title}} |築造時期=[[6世紀]]（古墳時代後期） |史跡指定=1974年（昭和49年）1月9日市指定{{Cite web|和書|author=生涯学習課|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=大分市の文化財|work=大分市|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |規模=[[横穴墓]]75基 |地図2 = {{Location map|Japan Oita|label=滝尾百穴
横穴古墳群|mark=横穴墓.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=大分県内の位置}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''滝尾百穴横穴古墳群'''（たきおひゃっけつよこあなこふんぐん）は、[[大分県]][[大分市]]羽田にある[[古墳時代]]後期後半の[[横穴墓]]群。'''滝尾百穴'''とも呼ばれる。大分市の[[史跡]]に指定されている。 == 概要 == [[大分市立滝尾中学校]]のグラウンドの北側にある火山灰層の[[崖]]に、様々な大きさの75基の横穴墓が3-4段に並んでいる。横穴墓の蓋部は崩壊して現存していない。横穴墓には多くのバリエーションがある。平面形状は正方形のもの、長方形のものがあり、天井の形状もドーム状、かまぼこ状、鴨居のような意匠のある妻入り家形、[[寄棟造|寄せ棟]]形等がある。また、床面に棺台があるものや、羨道の片方に袖石を有するものもある[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html 大分市の歴史探訪3（中部地区の文化財）] 大分市[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 滝尾百穴横穴古墳群 | スポット情報] 日本一の「おんせん県」大分県の観光情報公式サイト（公益社団法人ツーリズムおおいた）[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 滝尾百穴横穴古墳群｜観光スポット] 一般社団法人 大分市観光協会。 本横穴古墳群は、集団墓的な性質を持つ家族墓であると考えられている。 == 交通 == * バス - [[大分バス]] 萩原・[[あけのアクロスタウン|アクロス]]前・[[パークプレイス大分|パークプレイス]]・パークシティ明野・南下郡行きで米良バイパス入口下車。徒歩約10分。 == 脚注 == {{reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 滝尾百穴横穴古墳群 | スポット情報] 日本一の「おんせん県」大分県の観光情報公式サイト（公益社団法人ツーリズムおおいた） * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 滝尾百穴横穴古墳群｜観光スポット] 一般社団法人 大分市観光協会 {{DEFAULTSORT:たきおひやつけつよこあなこふんくん}} [[Category:横穴墓]] [[Category:群集墳]] [[Category:大分市の歴史]] [[Category:大分県の古墳]] [[Category:大分県内の市町村指定史跡]]

{{日本の古墳 |名称=滝尾百穴横穴古墳群 |別名=滝尾百穴 |画像=[[ファイル:滝尾百穴01.jpg|300px]] |画像キャプション=滝尾百穴横穴古墳群 |所在地=[[大分県]][[大分市]]羽田 |位置={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_scale:20000|display=inline,title}} |築造時期=[[6世紀]]（古墳時代後期） |史跡指定=1974年（昭和49年）1月9日市指定{{Cite web|和書|author=生涯学習課|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=大分市の文化財|work=大分市|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |規模=[[横穴墓]]75基 |地図2 = {{Location map|Japan Oita|label=滝尾百穴
横穴古墳群|mark=横穴墓.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=大分県内の位置}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''滝尾百穴横穴古墳群'''（たきおひゃっけつよこあなこふんぐん）は、[[大分県]][[大分市]]羽田にある[[古墳時代]]後期後半の[[横穴墓]]群。'''滝尾百穴'''とも呼ばれる。大分市の[[史跡]]に指定されている。 == 概要 == [[大分市立滝尾中学校]]のグラウンドの北側にある火山灰層の[[崖]]に、様々な大きさの75基の横穴墓が3-4段に並んでいる。横穴墓の蓋部は崩壊して現存していない。横穴墓には多くのバリエーションがある。平面形状は正方形のもの、長方形のものがあり、天井の形状もドーム状、かまぼこ状、鴨居のような意匠のある妻入り家形、[[寄棟造|寄せ棟]]形等がある。また、床面に棺台があるものや、羨道の片方に袖石を有するものもある[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html 大分市の歴史探訪3（中部地区の文化財）] 大分市[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 滝尾百穴横穴古墳群 | スポット情報] 日本一の「おんせん県」大分県の観光情報公式サイト（公益社団法人ツーリズムおおいた）[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 滝尾百穴横穴古墳群｜観光スポット] 一般社団法人 大分市観光協会。 本横穴古墳群は、集団墓的な性質を持つ家族墓であると考えられている。 == 交通 == * バス - [[大分バス]] 萩原・[[あけのアクロスタウン|アクロス]]前・[[パークプレイス大分|パークプレイス]]・パークシティ明野・南下郡行きで米良バイパス入口下車。徒歩約10分。 == 脚注 == {{reflist}} == 外部リンク == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 滝尾百穴横穴古墳群 | スポット情報] 日本一の「おんせん県」大分県の観光情報公式サイト（公益社団法人ツーリズムおおいた） * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 滝尾百穴横穴古墳群｜観光スポット] 一般社団法人 大分市観光協会 {{DEFAULTSORT:たきおひやつけつよこあなこふんくん}} [[Category:横穴墓]] [[Category:群集墳]] [[Category:大分市の歴史]] [[Category:大分県の古墳]] [[Category:大分県内の市町村指定史跡]]

{{afc comment|1=See [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Japanese Kofun |name=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |alternate_name=Takiō Hyakketsu |image=[[File:Takiō Hyakketsu 01.jpg|300px]] |image_caption=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |location={{ill|Oita City|ja|大分市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Oita Prefecture|ja|大分県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Haneda |coordinates={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_map_size:20000|display=inline,title}} |built=6th century (Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) |historic_site_Historic Site=Designated as a city historic site on January 9, 1974 (Shōwa 49){{Cite web|language=ja|author=Oita City Lifelong Learning Division|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=Oita City's Historic site|publisher=Oita City|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |map_size=75 cave tombs |image=滝尾百穴01.jpg |map={{location map|Japan Oita|map_dot_label=Takiō Hyakketsu
Cave Tomb Cluster|mark=Cave Tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Oita Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster''' (滝尾百穴横穴古墳群) is a cluster of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Cave tombs|ja|横穴墓|1=Cave tomb|qq=draft|qq=draft}} dating to the late 6th century during the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, located in {{ill|Oita City|ja|大分市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Oita Prefecture|ja|大分県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Haneda. It is also referred to simply as '''Takiō Hyakketsu'''. The site has been Historic site as a {{ill|Historic site|ja|史跡|1=Historic site|lt=Historic site of Japan|qq=draft|qq=draft}}} by Oita City. == Overview == The tombs are carved into a volcanic ash cliff north of the sports ground at {{ill|Oita City Takiō Junior High School|ja|大分市立滝尾中学校|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. A total of 75 tombs of various sizes are arranged in three to four tiers. The lids of the cave tombs have collapsed and no longer remain. The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as {{ill|Yosemune-zukuri|ja|寄棟造|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|qq=draft|qq=draft}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, [[Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013). {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Japanese Kofun |name=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |alternate_name=Takiō Hyakketsu |image=[[File:Takiō Hyakketsu 01.jpg|300px]] |image_caption=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |location={{ill|Oita City|ja|大分市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Oita Prefecture|ja|大分県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Haneda |coordinates={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_map_size:20000|display=inline,title}} |built=6th century (Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}}) |historic_site_Historic Site=Designated as a city historic site on January 9, 1974 (Shōwa 49){{Cite web|language=ja|author=Oita City Lifelong Learning Division|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=Oita City's Historic site|publisher=Oita City|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |map_size=75 cave tombs |image=滝尾百穴01.jpg |map={{location map|Japan Oita|map_dot_label=Takiō Hyakketsu
Cave Tomb Cluster|mark=Cave Tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Oita Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster''' (滝尾百穴横穴古墳群) is a cluster of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Cave tombs|ja|横穴墓|1=Cave tomb|qq=draft|qq=draft}} dating to the late 6th century during the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, located in {{ill|Oita City|ja|大分市|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Oita Prefecture|ja|大分県|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Haneda. It is also referred to simply as '''Takiō Hyakketsu'''. The site has been Historic site as a {{ill|Historic site|ja|史跡|1=Historic site|lt=Historic site of Japan|qq=draft|qq=draft}}} by Oita City. == Overview == The tombs are carved into a volcanic ash cliff north of the sports ground at {{ill|Oita City Takiō Junior High School|ja|大分市立滝尾中学校|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. A total of 75 tombs of various sizes are arranged in three to four tiers. The lids of the cave tombs have collapsed and no longer remain. The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as {{ill|Yosemune-zukuri|ja|寄棟造|qq=draft|qq=draft}}. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|qq=draft|qq=draft}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft}}, [[Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013). {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Japanese Kofun |name=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |alternate_name=Takiō Hyakketsu |image=[[File:Takiō Hyakketsu 01.jpg|300px]] |image_caption=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |location={{ill|Oita City|ja|大分市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita City|qq=}}, {{ill|Oita Prefecture|ja|大分県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita Prefecture|qq=}}, Haneda |coordinates={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_map_size:20000|display=inline,title}} |built=6th century (Late {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}) |historic_site_Historic Site=Designated as a city historic site on January 9, 1974 (Shōwa 49){{Cite web|language=ja|author=Oita City Lifelong Learning Division|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=Oita City's Historic site|publisher=Oita City|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |map_size=75 cave tombs |image=滝尾百穴01.jpg |map={{location map|Japan Oita|map_dot_label=Takiō Hyakketsu
Cave Tomb Cluster|mark=Cave Tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Oita Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster''' (滝尾百穴横穴古墳群) is a cluster of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Cave tombs|ja|横穴墓|1=Cave tomb|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cave tombs|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} dating to the late 6th century during the {{ill|Kofun period|ja|古墳時代|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kofun period|qq=}}, located in {{ill|Oita City|ja|大分市|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita City|qq=}}, {{ill|Oita Prefecture|ja|大分県|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita Prefecture|qq=}}, Haneda. It is also referred to simply as '''Takiō Hyakketsu'''. The site has been Historic site as a {{ill|Historic site|ja|史跡|1=Historic site|lt=Historic site of Japan|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Historic site|13=User:Immanuelle/Historic site|qq=}}} by Oita City. == Overview == The tombs are carved into a volcanic ash cliff north of the sports ground at {{ill|Oita City Takiō Junior High School|ja|大分市立滝尾中学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita City Takiō Junior High School|qq=}}. A total of 75 tombs of various sizes are arranged in three to four tiers. The lids of the cave tombs have collapsed and no longer remain. The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as {{ill|Yosemune-zukuri|ja|寄棟造|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yosemune-zukuri|qq=}}. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/genkan|13=User:Immanuelle/endō|qq=}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita Bus|qq=}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akros|qq=}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Park Place Oita|qq=}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013). History of Cave Tombs. * {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|滝尾百穴横穴古墳群|version=98185626|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Clustered tombs]] [[Category:History of Oita City]] [[Category:Kofun in Oita Prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic sites of Oita Prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun period]] [[Category:Japanese burial practices]] [[Category:Corridor-type kofun]] [[Category:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]][[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]][[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]]}} [[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]] [[ja:滝尾百穴横穴古墳群]] [[ja:大分市]] [[ja:蓮ヶ池横穴群]] [[ja:宮崎市]] [[ja:横穴墓]] [[sn:akio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]] [[en:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]]

The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as [[:en:Hip roof|Yosemune-zukuri]]. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/genkan|13=User:Immanuelle/endō|qq=}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita Bus|qq=}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akros|qq=}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Park Place Oita|qq=}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Japanese Kofun |name=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |alternate_name=Takiō Hyakketsu |image=[[File:Takiō Hyakketsu 01.jpg|300px]] |image_caption=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |location=[[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda |coordinates={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_map_size:20000|display=inline,title}} |built=6th century (Late [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]]) |historic_site_Historic Site=Designated as a city historic site on January 9, 1974 (Shōwa 49){{Cite web|language=ja|author=Oita City Lifelong Learning Division|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=Oita City's Historic site|publisher=Oita City|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |map_size=75 cave tombs |image=滝尾百穴01.jpg |map={{location map|Japan Oita|map_dot_label=Takiō Hyakketsu
Cave Tomb Cluster|mark=Cave Tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Oita Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster''' (滝尾百穴横穴古墳群) is a cluster of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Cave tombs|ja|横穴墓|1=Cave tomb|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cave tombs|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} dating to the late 6th century during the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], located in [[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda. It is also referred to simply as '''Takiō Hyakketsu'''. The site has been Historic site as a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site of Japan]]} by Oita City. == Overview == The tombs are carved into a volcanic ash cliff north of the sports ground at {{ill|Oita City Takiō Junior High School|ja|大分市立滝尾中学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita City Takiō Junior High School|qq=}}. A total of 75 tombs of various sizes are arranged in three to four tiers. The lids of the cave tombs have collapsed and no longer remain. The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as [[:en:Hip roof|Yosemune-zukuri]]. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/genkan|13=User:Immanuelle/endō|qq=}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita Bus|qq=}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akros|qq=}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Park Place Oita|qq=}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013). Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Japanese Kofun |name=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |alternate_name=Takiō Hyakketsu |image=[[File:Takiō Hyakketsu 01.jpg|300px]] |image_caption=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |location=[[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda |coordinates={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_map_size:20000|display=inline,title}} |built=6th century (Late [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]]) |historic_site_Historic Site=Designated as a city historic site on January 9, 1974 (Shōwa 49){{Cite web|language=ja|author=Oita City Lifelong Learning Division|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=Oita City's Historic site|publisher=Oita City|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |map_size=75 cave tombs |image=滝尾百穴01.jpg |map={{location map|Japan Oita|map_dot_label=Takiō Hyakketsu
Cave Tomb Cluster|mark=Cave Tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Oita Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster''' (滝尾百穴横穴古墳群) is a cluster of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Cave tombs|ja|横穴墓|1=Cave tomb|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cave tombs|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} dating to the late 6th century during the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], located in [[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda. It is also referred to simply as '''Takiō Hyakketsu'''. The site has been Historic site as a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site of Japan]]} by Oita City. == Overview == The tombs are carved into a volcanic ash cliff north of the sports ground at {{ill|Oita City Takiō Junior High School|ja|大分市立滝尾中学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita City Takiō Junior High School|qq=}}. A total of 75 tombs of various sizes are arranged in three to four tiers. The lids of the cave tombs have collapsed and no longer remain. The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as [[:en:Hip roof|Yosemune-zukuri]]. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/genkan|13=User:Immanuelle/endō|qq=}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita Bus|qq=}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akros|qq=}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Park Place Oita|qq=}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Japanese Kofun |name=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |alternate_name=Takiō Hyakketsu |image=[[File:Takiō Hyakketsu 01.jpg|300px]] |image_caption=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |location=[[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda |coordinates={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_map_size:20000|display=inline,title}} |built=6th century (Late [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]]) |historic_site_Historic Site=Designated as a city historic site on January 9, 1974 (Shōwa 49){{Cite web|language=ja|author=Oita City Lifelong Learning Division|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=Oita City's Historic site|publisher=Oita City|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |map_size=75 cave tombs |image=滝尾百穴01.jpg |map={{location map|Japan Oita|map_dot_label=Takiō Hyakketsu
Cave Tomb Cluster|mark=Cave Tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Oita Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster''' (滝尾百穴横穴古墳群) is a cluster of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Cave tombs|ja|横穴墓|1=Cave tomb|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cave tombs|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} dating to the late 6th century during the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], located in [[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda. It is also referred to simply as '''Takiō Hyakketsu'''. The site has been Historic site as a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site of Japan]]} by Oita City. == Overview == The tombs are carved into a volcanic ash cliff north of the sports ground at {{ill|Oita City Takiō Junior High School|ja|大分市立滝尾中学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita City Takiō Junior High School|qq=}}. A total of 75 tombs of various sizes are arranged in three to four tiers. The lids of the cave tombs have collapsed and no longer remain. The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as [[:en:Hip roof|Yosemune-zukuri]]. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/genkan|13=User:Immanuelle/endō|qq=}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita Bus|qq=}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akros|qq=}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Park Place Oita|qq=}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013). Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Japanese Kofun |name=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |alternate_name=Takiō Hyakketsu |image=[[File:Takiō Hyakketsu 01.jpg|300px]] |image_caption=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |location=[[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda |coordinates={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_map_size:20000|display=inline,title}} |built=6th century (Late [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]]) |historic_site_Historic Site=Designated as a city historic site on January 9, 1974 (Shōwa 49){{Cite web|language=ja|author=Oita City Lifelong Learning Division|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=Oita City's Historic site|publisher=Oita City|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |map_size=75 cave tombs |image=滝尾百穴01.jpg |map={{location map|Japan Oita|map_dot_label=Takiō Hyakketsu
Cave Tomb Cluster|mark=Cave Tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Oita Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster''' (滝尾百穴横穴古墳群) is a cluster of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Cave tombs|ja|横穴墓|1=Cave tomb|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cave tombs|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} dating to the late 6th century during the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], located in [[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda. It is also referred to simply as '''Takiō Hyakketsu'''. The site has been Historic site as a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site of Japan]]} by Oita City. == Overview == The tombs are carved into a volcanic ash cliff north of the sports ground at {{ill|Oita City Takiō Junior High School|ja|大分市立滝尾中学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita City Takiō Junior High School|qq=}}. A total of 75 tombs of various sizes are arranged in three to four tiers. The lids of the cave tombs have collapsed and no longer remain. The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as [[:en:Hip roof|Yosemune-zukuri]]. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/genkan|13=User:Immanuelle/endō|qq=}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita Bus|qq=}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akros|qq=}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Park Place Oita|qq=}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013). History of Cave Tombs. * {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|滝尾百穴横穴古墳群|version=98185626|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it]] [[Category:Kofun template and pages that transclude it 2]] [[Category:marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Kofun in Oita Prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic sites of Oita Prefecture]] [[Category:Kofun period]] [[Category:Japanese burial practices]] [[Category:Corridor-type kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[Category:Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]][[Category:Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters]] [[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]][[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]][[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]]}} [[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]] [[ja:滝尾百穴横穴古墳群]] [[ja:大分市]] [[ja:蓮ヶ池横穴群]] [[ja:宮崎市]] [[ja:横穴墓]] [[sn:akio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:History of Oita, Oita]] [[Category:Kofun of Oita prefecture]] [[Category:大分県内の市町村指定史跡]] [[Category:群集墳]]

Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013).
