{{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Japanese Kofun |name=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |alternate_name=Takiō Hyakketsu |image=[[File:Takiō Hyakketsu 01.jpg|300px]] |image_caption=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |location=[[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda |coordinates={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_map_size:20000|display=inline,title}} |built=6th century (Late [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]]) |historic_site_Historic Site=Designated as a city historic site on January 9, 1974 (Shōwa 49){{Cite web|language=ja|author=Oita City Lifelong Learning Division|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=Oita City's Historic site|publisher=Oita City|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |map_size=75 cave tombs |image=滝尾百穴01.jpg |map={{location map|Japan Oita|map_dot_label=Takiō Hyakketsu
Cave Tomb Cluster|mark=Cave Tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Oita Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster''' (滝尾百穴横穴古墳群) is a cluster of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Cave tombs|ja|横穴墓|1=Cave tomb|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cave tombs|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} dating to the late 6th century during the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], located in [[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda. It is also referred to simply as '''Takiō Hyakketsu'''. The site has been Historic site as a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site of Japan]]} by Oita City. == Overview == The tombs are carved into a volcanic ash cliff north of the sports ground at {{ill|Oita City Takiō Junior High School|ja|大分市立滝尾中学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita City Takiō Junior High School|qq=}}. A total of 75 tombs of various sizes are arranged in three to four tiers. The lids of the cave tombs have collapsed and no longer remain. The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as [[:en:Hip roof|Yosemune-zukuri]]. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/genkan|13=User:Immanuelle/endō|qq=}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita Bus|qq=}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akros|qq=}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Park Place Oita|qq=}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013). Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013). revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Secondary Marked infobox kofun with unknown parameters

{{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Japanese Kofun |name=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |alternate_name=Takiō Hyakketsu |image=[[File:Takiō Hyakketsu 01.jpg|300px]] |image_caption=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |location=[[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda |coordinates={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_map_size:20000|display=inline,title}} |built=6th century (Late [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]]) |historic_site_Historic Site=Designated as a city historic site on January 9, 1974 (Shōwa 49){{Cite web|language=ja|author=Oita City Lifelong Learning Division|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=Oita City's Historic site|publisher=Oita City|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |map_size=75 cave tombs |image=滝尾百穴01.jpg |map={{location map|Japan Oita|map_dot_label=Takiō Hyakketsu
Cave Tomb Cluster|mark=Cave Tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Oita Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster''' (滝尾百穴横穴古墳群) is a cluster of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Cave tombs|ja|横穴墓|1=Cave tomb|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cave tombs|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} dating to the late 6th century during the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], located in [[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda. It is also referred to simply as '''Takiō Hyakketsu'''. The site has been Historic site as a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site of Japan]]} by Oita City. == Overview == The tombs are carved into a volcanic ash cliff north of the sports ground at {{ill|Oita City Takiō Junior High School|ja|大分市立滝尾中学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita City Takiō Junior High School|qq=}}. A total of 75 tombs of various sizes are arranged in three to four tiers. The lids of the cave tombs have collapsed and no longer remain. The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as [[:en:Hip roof|Yosemune-zukuri]]. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/genkan|13=User:Immanuelle/endō|qq=}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita Bus|qq=}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akros|qq=}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Park Place Oita|qq=}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). History of Cave Tombs. * {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|滝尾百穴横穴古墳群|version=98185626|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun period]] [[Category:Corridor-type kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]][[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]][[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]]}} [[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]] [[ja:滝尾百穴横穴古墳群]] [[ja:大分市]] [[ja:蓮ヶ池横穴群]] [[ja:宮崎市]] [[ja:横穴墓]] [[sn:akio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:History of Oita, Oita]] [[Category:Kofun of Oita prefecture]] [[Category:大分県内の市町村指定史跡]] [[Category:Gunshūfun]]

revision.comment: Merge [[Category:大分県内の市町村指定史跡]] into [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Oita Prefecture]] via bot
revision.text:
{{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Japanese Kofun |name=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |alternate_name=Takiō Hyakketsu |image=[[File:Takiō Hyakketsu 01.jpg|300px]] |image_caption=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |location=[[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda |coordinates={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_map_size:20000|display=inline,title}} |built=6th century (Late [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]]) |historic_site_Historic Site=Designated as a city historic site on January 9, 1974 (Shōwa 49){{Cite web|language=ja|author=Oita City Lifelong Learning Division|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=Oita City's Historic site|publisher=Oita City|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |map_size=75 cave tombs |image=滝尾百穴01.jpg |map={{location map|Japan Oita|map_dot_label=Takiō Hyakketsu
Cave Tomb Cluster|mark=Cave Tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Oita Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster''' (滝尾百穴横穴古墳群) is a cluster of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Cave tombs|ja|横穴墓|1=Cave tomb|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cave tombs|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} dating to the late 6th century during the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], located in [[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda. It is also referred to simply as '''Takiō Hyakketsu'''. The site has been Historic site as a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site of Japan]]} by Oita City. == Overview == The tombs are carved into a volcanic ash cliff north of the sports ground at {{ill|Oita City Takiō Junior High School|ja|大分市立滝尾中学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita City Takiō Junior High School|qq=}}. A total of 75 tombs of various sizes are arranged in three to four tiers. The lids of the cave tombs have collapsed and no longer remain. The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as [[:en:Hip roof|Yosemune-zukuri]]. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/genkan|13=User:Immanuelle/endō|qq=}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita Bus|qq=}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akros|qq=}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Park Place Oita|qq=}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[:en:Miyazaki Prefecture|Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013). History of Cave Tombs. * {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|滝尾百穴横穴古墳群|version=98185626|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun period]] [[Category:Corridor-type kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]][[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]][[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]]}} [[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]] [[ja:滝尾百穴横穴古墳群]] [[ja:大分市]] [[ja:蓮ヶ池横穴群]] [[ja:宮崎市]] [[ja:横穴墓]] [[sn:akio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:History of Oita, Oita]] [[Category:Kofun of Oita prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Oita Prefecture]] [[Category:Gunshūfun]]

{{Infobox ancient site|location={{ill|Oita|qid=Q199609}}|coordinates={{Coord|33.216055555555556|N|131.63380555555557|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q18338700]] Wikidata name: [[Category:Add wikidata]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Japanese Kofun |name=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |alternate_name=Takiō Hyakketsu |image=[[File:Takiō Hyakketsu 01.jpg|300px]] |image_caption=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |location=[[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda |coordinates={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_map_size:20000|display=inline,title}} |built=6th century (Late [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]]) |historic_site_Historic Site=Designated as a city historic site on January 9, 1974 (Shōwa 49){{Cite web|language=ja|author=Oita City Lifelong Learning Division|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=Oita City's Historic site|publisher=Oita City|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |map_size=75 cave tombs |image=滝尾百穴01.jpg |map={{location map|Japan Oita|map_dot_label=Takiō Hyakketsu
Cave Tomb Cluster|mark=Cave Tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Oita Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster''' (滝尾百穴横穴古墳群) is a cluster of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Cave tombs|ja|横穴墓|1=Cave tomb|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cave tombs|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} dating to the late 6th century during the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], located in [[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda. It is also referred to simply as '''Takiō Hyakketsu'''. The site has been Historic site as a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site of Japan]]} by Oita City. == Overview == The tombs are carved into a volcanic ash cliff north of the sports ground at {{ill|Oita City Takiō Junior High School|ja|大分市立滝尾中学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita City Takiō Junior High School|qq=}}. A total of 75 tombs of various sizes are arranged in three to four tiers. The lids of the cave tombs have collapsed and no longer remain. The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as [[:en:Hip roof|Yosemune-zukuri]]. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/genkan|13=User:Immanuelle/endō|qq=}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita Bus|qq=}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akros|qq=}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Park Place Oita|qq=}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[:en:Miyazaki Prefecture|Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013). History of Cave Tombs. * {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|滝尾百穴横穴古墳群|version=98185626|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun period]] [[Category:Corridor-type kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]][[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]][[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]]}} [[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]] [[ja:滝尾百穴横穴古墳群]] [[ja:大分市]] [[ja:蓮ヶ池横穴群]] [[ja:宮崎市]] [[ja:横穴墓]] [[sn:akio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:History of Oita, Oita]] [[Category:Kofun of Oita prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Oita Prefecture]] [[Category:Gunshūfun]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]]

{{Infobox ancient site|location={{ill|Oita|qid=Q199609}}|coordinates={{Coord|33.216055555555556|N|131.63380555555557|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q18338700]] Wikidata name: [[Category:Add wikidata]] [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Japanese Kofun |name=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |alternate_name=Takiō Hyakketsu |image=[[File:Takiō Hyakketsu 01.jpg|300px]] |image_caption=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |location=[[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda |coordinates={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_map_size:20000|display=inline,title}} |built=6th century (Late [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]]) |historic_site_Historic Site=Designated as a city historic site on January 9, 1974 (Shōwa 49){{Cite web|language=ja|author=Oita City Lifelong Learning Division|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=Oita City's Historic site|publisher=Oita City|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |map_size=75 cave tombs |image=滝尾百穴01.jpg |map={{location map|Japan Oita|map_dot_label=Takiō Hyakketsu
Cave Tomb Cluster|mark=Cave Tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Oita Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster''' (滝尾百穴横穴古墳群) is a cluster of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Cave tombs|ja|横穴墓|1=Cave tomb|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cave tombs|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} dating to the late 6th century during the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], located in [[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda. It is also referred to simply as '''Takiō Hyakketsu'''. The site has been Historic site as a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site of Japan]]} by Oita City. == Overview == The tombs are carved into a volcanic ash cliff north of the sports ground at {{ill|Oita City Takiō Junior High School|ja|大分市立滝尾中学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita City Takiō Junior High School|qq=|1=Oita City Takiō Junior High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432734}}. A total of 75 tombs of various sizes are arranged in three to four tiers. The lids of the cave tombs have collapsed and no longer remain. The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as [[:en:Hip roof|Yosemune-zukuri]]. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/genkan|13=User:Immanuelle/endō|qq=}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita Bus|qq=|1=Oita Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432629}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akros|qq=|1=AKENO ACROSS TOWN|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11257072}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Park Place Oita|qq=|1=Park Place Oita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11329797}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[:en:Miyazaki Prefecture|Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013). History of Cave Tombs. * {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|滝尾百穴横穴古墳群|version=98185626|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun period]] [[Category:Corridor-type kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]][[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]][[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]]}} [[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]] [[ja:滝尾百穴横穴古墳群]] [[ja:大分市]] [[ja:蓮ヶ池横穴群]] [[ja:宮崎市]] [[ja:横穴墓]] [[sn:akio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:History of Oita, Oita]] [[Category:Kofun of Oita prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Oita Prefecture]] [[Category:Gunshūfun]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]][[Category:qq]]

{{Infobox ancient site|location={{ill|Oita|qid=Q199609}}|coordinates={{Coord|33.216055555555556|N|131.63380555555557|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q18338700]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through [[Special:MassEditRegex]] to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Japanese Kofun |name=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |alternate_name=Takiō Hyakketsu |image=[[File:Takiō Hyakketsu 01.jpg|300px]] |image_caption=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |location=[[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda |coordinates={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_map_size:20000|display=inline,title}} |built=6th century (Late [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]]) |historic_site_Historic Site=Designated as a city historic site on January 9, 1974 (Shōwa 49){{Cite web|language=ja|author=Oita City Lifelong Learning Division|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=Oita City's Historic site|publisher=Oita City|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |map_size=75 cave tombs |image=滝尾百穴01.jpg |map={{location map|Japan Oita|map_dot_label=Takiō Hyakketsu
Cave Tomb Cluster|mark=Cave Tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Oita Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster''' (滝尾百穴横穴古墳群) is a cluster of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Cave tombs|ja|横穴墓|1=Cave tomb|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cave tombs|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} dating to the late 6th century during the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], located in [[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda. It is also referred to simply as '''Takiō Hyakketsu'''. The site has been Historic site as a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site of Japan]]} by Oita City. == Overview == The tombs are carved into a volcanic ash cliff north of the sports ground at {{ill|Oita City Takiō Junior High School|ja|大分市立滝尾中学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita City Takiō Junior High School|qq=|1=Oita City Takiō Junior High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432734}}. A total of 75 tombs of various sizes are arranged in three to four tiers. The lids of the cave tombs have collapsed and no longer remain. The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as [[:en:Hip roof|Yosemune-zukuri]]. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/genkan|13=User:Immanuelle/endō|qq=}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita Bus|qq=|1=Oita Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432629}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akros|qq=|1=AKENO ACROSS TOWN|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11257072}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Park Place Oita|qq=|1=Park Place Oita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11329797}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[:en:Miyazaki Prefecture|Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013). History of Cave Tombs. * {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|滝尾百穴横穴古墳群|version=98185626|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun period]] [[Category:Corridor-type kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] [[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]][[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]][[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]]}} [[sn:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]] [[ja:滝尾百穴横穴古墳群]] [[ja:大分市]] [[ja:蓮ヶ池横穴群]] [[ja:宮崎市]] [[ja:横穴墓]] [[sn:akio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]] [[Category:History of Oita, Oita]] [[Category:Kofun of Oita prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Oita Prefecture]] [[Category:Gunshūfun]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] [[en:Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster]] {{wikidata link|Q18338700}}

{{Infobox ancient site|location={{ill|Oita|qid=Q199609}}|coordinates={{Coord|33.216055555555556|N|131.63380555555557|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q18338700]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Japanese Kofun |name=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |alternate_name=Takiō Hyakketsu |image=[[File:Takiō Hyakketsu 01.jpg|300px]] |image_caption=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |location=[[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda |coordinates={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_map_size:20000|display=inline,title}} |built=6th century (Late [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]]) |historic_site_Historic Site=Designated as a city historic site on January 9, 1974 (Shōwa 49){{Cite web|language=ja|author=Oita City Lifelong Learning Division|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=Oita City's Historic site|publisher=Oita City|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |map_size=75 cave tombs |image=滝尾百穴01.jpg |map={{location map|Japan Oita|map_dot_label=Takiō Hyakketsu
Cave Tomb Cluster|mark=Cave Tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Oita Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster''' (滝尾百穴横穴古墳群) is a cluster of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Cave tombs|ja|横穴墓|1=Cave tomb|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cave tombs|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} dating to the late 6th century during the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], located in [[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda. It is also referred to simply as '''Takiō Hyakketsu'''. The site has been Historic site as a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site of Japan]]} by Oita City. == Overview == The tombs are carved into a volcanic ash cliff north of the sports ground at {{ill|Oita City Takiō Junior High School|ja|大分市立滝尾中学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita City Takiō Junior High School|qq=|1=Oita City Takiō Junior High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432734}}. A total of 75 tombs of various sizes are arranged in three to four tiers. The lids of the cave tombs have collapsed and no longer remain. The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as [[:en:Hip roof|Yosemune-zukuri]]. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/genkan|13=User:Immanuelle/endō|qq=}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita Bus|qq=|1=Oita Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432629}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akros|qq=|1=AKENO ACROSS TOWN|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11257072}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Park Place Oita|qq=|1=Park Place Oita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11329797}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[:en:Miyazaki Prefecture|Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013). History of Cave Tombs. * {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|滝尾百穴横穴古墳群|version=98185626|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun period]] [[Category:Corridor-type kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] }} [[ja:滝尾百穴横穴古墳群]] [[ja:大分市]] [[ja:蓮ヶ池横穴群]] [[ja:宮崎市]] [[ja:横穴墓]] [[Category:History of Oita, Oita]] [[Category:Kofun of Oita prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Oita Prefecture]] [[Category:Gunshūfun]] [[Category:pages without english wikidata name]] {{wikidata link|Q18338700}}

This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Japanese Kofun |name=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |alternate_name=Takiō Hyakketsu |image=[[File:Takiō Hyakketsu 01.jpg|300px]] |image_caption=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |location=[[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda |coordinates={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_map_size:20000|display=inline,title}} |built=6th century (Late [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]]) |historic_site_Historic Site=Designated as a city historic site on January 9, 1974 (Shōwa 49){{Cite web|language=ja|author=Oita City Lifelong Learning Division|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=Oita City's Historic site|publisher=Oita City|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |map_size=75 cave tombs |image=滝尾百穴01.jpg |map={{location map|Japan Oita|map_dot_label=Takiō Hyakketsu
Cave Tomb Cluster|mark=Cave Tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Oita Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster''' (滝尾百穴横穴古墳群) is a cluster of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Cave tombs|ja|横穴墓|1=Cave tomb|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cave tombs|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} dating to the late 6th century during the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], located in [[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda. It is also referred to simply as '''Takiō Hyakketsu'''. The site has been Historic site as a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site of Japan]]} by Oita City. == Overview == The tombs are carved into a volcanic ash cliff north of the sports ground at {{ill|Oita City Takiō Junior High School|ja|大分市立滝尾中学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita City Takiō Junior High School|qq=|1=Oita City Takiō Junior High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432734}}. A total of 75 tombs of various sizes are arranged in three to four tiers. The lids of the cave tombs have collapsed and no longer remain. The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as [[:en:Hip roof|Yosemune-zukuri]]. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/genkan|13=User:Immanuelle/endō|qq=}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita Bus|qq=|1=Oita Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432629}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akros|qq=|1=AKENO ACROSS TOWN|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11257072}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Park Place Oita|qq=|1=Park Place Oita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11329797}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[:en:Miyazaki Prefecture|Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013). History of Cave Tombs. * {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|滝尾百穴横穴古墳群|version=98185626|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun period]] [[Category:Corridor-type kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] }} [[ja:滝尾百穴横穴古墳群]] [[ja:大分市]] [[ja:蓮ヶ池横穴群]] [[ja:宮崎市]] [[ja:横穴墓]] [[Category:History of Oita, Oita]] [[Category:Kofun of Oita prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Oita Prefecture]] [[Category:Gunshūfun]] {{wikidata link|Q18338700}}

[[ja:滝尾百穴横穴古墳群]] {{Infobox ancient site|location={{ill|Oita|WD=Q199609}}|coordinates={{Coord|33.216055555555556|N|131.63380555555557|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q18338700]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:48, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=See as this is a member[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 22:44, 22 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=trimming these off. the parameter works as "burial" so no need to use "burial"[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:35, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=added parameters Interred_individual and Mausoleum is planned to be added but I messed up in template editing[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:40, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=now we have a 'burial' and 'burial goods' parameter. So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Japanese Kofun |name=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |alternate_name=Takiō Hyakketsu |image=[[File:Takiō Hyakketsu 01.jpg|300px]] |image_caption=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |location=[[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda |coordinates={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_map_size:20000|display=inline,title}} |built=6th century (Late [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]]) |historic_site_Historic Site=Designated as a city historic site on January 9, 1974 (Shōwa 49){{Cite web|language=ja|author=Oita City Lifelong Learning Division|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=Oita City's Historic site|publisher=Oita City|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |map_size=75 cave tombs |image=滝尾百穴01.jpg |map={{location map|Japan Oita|map_dot_label=Takiō Hyakketsu
Cave Tomb Cluster|mark=Cave Tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Oita Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster''' (滝尾百穴横穴古墳群) is a cluster of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Cave tombs|ja|横穴墓|1=Cave tomb|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cave tombs|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} dating to the late 6th century during the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], located in [[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda. It is also referred to simply as '''Takiō Hyakketsu'''. The site has been Historic site as a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site of Japan]]} by Oita City. == Overview == The tombs are carved into a volcanic ash cliff north of the sports ground at {{ill|Oita City Takiō Junior High School|ja|大分市立滝尾中学校|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita City Takiō Junior High School|1=Oita City Takiō Junior High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432734}}. A total of 75 tombs of various sizes are arranged in three to four tiers. The lids of the cave tombs have collapsed and no longer remain. The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as [[:en:Hip roof|Yosemune-zukuri]]. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/genkan|13=User:Immanuelle/endō|qq=}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita Bus|1=Oita Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432629}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akros|1=AKENO ACROSS TOWN|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11257072}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Park Place Oita|1=Park Place Oita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11329797}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[:en:Miyazaki Prefecture|Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013). History of Cave Tombs. * {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|滝尾百穴横穴古墳群|version=98185626|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun period]] [[Category:Corridor-type kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] }} [[ja:滝尾百穴横穴古墳群]] [[ja:大分市]] [[ja:蓮ヶ池横穴群]] [[ja:宮崎市]] [[ja:横穴墓]] [[Category:History of Oita, Oita]] [[Category:Kofun of Oita prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Oita Prefecture]] [[Category:Gunshūfun]] {{wikidata link|Q18338700}}

So a lot of these pages might not be marked on our wiki as having unknown parameters. But specifically keeping this comment here in case of import, these parameters should be added to [[Template:infobox ancient site]] rather than deleted from this draft or article[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 02:02, 28 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{afc comment|1=I hope this is not too annoying but this article is gonna be placed under and there is a decent chance these unknown parameters are ones I want added to the main template like burial chamber structure and burial goods. Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Japanese Kofun |name=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |alternate_name=Takiō Hyakketsu |image=[[File:Takiō Hyakketsu 01.jpg|300px]] |image_caption=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |location=[[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda |coordinates={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_map_size:20000|display=inline,title}} |built=6th century (Late [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]]) |historic_site_Historic Site=Designated as a city historic site on January 9, 1974 (Shōwa 49){{Cite web|language=ja|author=Oita City Lifelong Learning Division|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=Oita City's Historic site|publisher=Oita City|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |map_size=75 cave tombs |image=滝尾百穴01.jpg |map={{location map|Japan Oita|map_dot_label=Takiō Hyakketsu
Cave Tomb Cluster|mark=Cave Tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Oita Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster''' (滝尾百穴横穴古墳群) is a cluster of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Cave tombs|ja|横穴墓|1=Cave tomb|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cave tombs|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} dating to the late 6th century during the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], located in [[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda. It is also referred to simply as '''Takiō Hyakketsu'''. The site has been Historic site as a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site of Japan]]} by Oita City. == Overview == The tombs are carved into a volcanic ash cliff north of the sports ground at {{ill|Oita City Takiō Junior High School|ja|大分市立滝尾中学校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita City Takiō Junior High School|1=Oita City Takiō Junior High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432734}}. A total of 75 tombs of various sizes are arranged in three to four tiers. The lids of the cave tombs have collapsed and no longer remain. The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as [[:en:Hip roof|Yosemune-zukuri]]. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/genkan|13=User:Immanuelle/endō|qq=}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita Bus|1=Oita Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432629}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akros|1=AKENO ACROSS TOWN|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11257072}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Park Place Oita|1=Park Place Oita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11329797}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[:en:Miyazaki Prefecture|Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013). History of Cave Tombs. * {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|滝尾百穴横穴古墳群|version=98185626|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun period]] [[Category:Corridor-type kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] }} [[ja:滝尾百穴横穴古墳群]] [[ja:大分市]] [[ja:蓮ヶ池横穴群]] [[ja:宮崎市]] [[ja:横穴墓]] [[Category:History of Oita, Oita]] [[Category:Kofun of Oita prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Oita Prefecture]] [[Category:Gunshūfun]] {{wikidata link|Q18338700}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]

This was added through to all pages with the category so apologies if it was just some kind of an error like the image parameter being in Japanese[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 06:00, 27 March 2025 (UTC)}} {{Japanese Kofun |name=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |alternate_name=Takiō Hyakketsu |image=[[File:Takiō Hyakketsu 01.jpg|300px]] |image_caption=Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster |location=[[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda |coordinates={{Coord|33|12|57.8|N|131|38|01.7|E|region:JP-44_type:landmark_map_size:20000|display=inline,title}} |built=6th century (Late [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]]) |historic_site_Historic Site=Designated as a city historic site on January 9, 1974 (Shōwa 49){{Cite web|language=ja|author=Oita City Lifelong Learning Division|url=https://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/culturalproperty.html|title=Oita City's Historic site|publisher=Oita City|date=2021-08-05|accessdate=2021-08-11}} |map_size=75 cave tombs |image=滝尾百穴01.jpg |map={{location map|Japan Oita|map_dot_label=Takiō Hyakketsu
Cave Tomb Cluster|mark=Cave Tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Oita Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster''' (滝尾百穴横穴古墳群) is a cluster of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Cave tombs|ja|横穴墓|1=Cave tomb|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cave tombs|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} dating to the late 6th century during the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], located in [[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda. It is also referred to simply as '''Takiō Hyakketsu'''. The site has been Historic site as a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site of Japan]]} by Oita City. == Overview == The tombs are carved into a volcanic ash cliff north of the sports ground at {{ill|Oita City Takiō Junior High School|ja|大分市立滝尾中学校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita City Takiō Junior High School|1=Oita City Takiō Junior High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432734}}. A total of 75 tombs of various sizes are arranged in three to four tiers. The lids of the cave tombs have collapsed and no longer remain. The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as [[:en:Hip roof|Yosemune-zukuri]]. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/genkan|13=User:Immanuelle/endō|qq=}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita Bus|1=Oita Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432629}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akros|1=AKENO ACROSS TOWN|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11257072}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Park Place Oita|1=Park Place Oita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11329797}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[:en:Miyazaki Prefecture|Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013). History of Cave Tombs. * {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|滝尾百穴横穴古墳群|version=98185626|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun period]] [[Category:Corridor-type kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] }} [[ja:滝尾百穴横穴古墳群]] [[ja:大分市]] [[ja:蓮ヶ池横穴群]] [[ja:宮崎市]] [[ja:横穴墓]] [[Category:History of Oita, Oita]] [[Category:Kofun of Oita prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Oita Prefecture]] [[Category:Gunshūfun]] {{wikidata link|Q18338700}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]][[Category:LINKED FROM WIKIDATA DO NOT OVERWRITE]]

Please do not use any bots that just remove the unknown parameters without looking at them. Cave Tomb Cluster|mark=Cave Tomb.svg|marksize=25|float=center|border=none|position=bottom|width=200|caption=location in Oita Prefecture}} {{maplink2|type=point|frame=yes|plain=yes|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster''' (滝尾百穴横穴古墳群) is a cluster of {{ill|cave tombs|lt=Cave tombs|ja|横穴墓|1=Cave tomb|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/cave tombs|13=User:Immanuelle/Cave tomb|qq=}} dating to the late 6th century during the [[:en:Kofun period|Kofun period]], located in [[:en:Ōita (city)|Oita City]], [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Oita Prefecture]], Haneda. It is also referred to simply as '''Takiō Hyakketsu'''. The site has been Historic site as a [[:en:Historic site|Historic site of Japan]]} by Oita City. == Overview == The tombs are carved into a volcanic ash cliff north of the sports ground at {{ill|Oita City Takiō Junior High School|ja|大分市立滝尾中学校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita City Takiō Junior High School|1=Oita City Takiō Junior High School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432734}}. A total of 75 tombs of various sizes are arranged in three to four tiers. The lids of the cave tombs have collapsed and no longer remain. The tombs exhibit a variety of types, with square and rectangular floor plans, and ceilings shaped in dome, semi-cylindrical, and gabled styles such as [[:en:Hip roof|Yosemune-zukuri]]. Some tombs feature coffin plattypes on the floor, while others have stone slabs (sode-ishi) positioned on one side of the entrance passage ({{ill|genkan|ja|羨道|1=endō|lt=endō (tomb entrance)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/genkan|13=User:Immanuelle/endō|qq=}}).[http://www.city.oita.oita.jp/o204/bunkasports/shitebunkazai/1094724531265.html Exploring Oita City's History 3 (Historic site of the Central Region)] Oita City[https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita)[https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association This cave tomb cluster is believed to have been used as a collective family burial site. == Access == * '''By Bus''' – Take the {{ill|Oita Bus|ja|大分バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oita Bus|1=Oita Bus|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11432629}} bound for Hagiwara, {{ill|Akros|ja|あけのアクロスタウン|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Akros|1=AKENO ACROSS TOWN|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11257072}}, {{ill|Park Place Oita|ja|パークプレイス大分|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Park Place Oita|1=Park Place Oita|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11329797}}, Park City Akino, or Minami-Kuge, and alight at the Mera Bypass Entrance stop. Walk approximately 10 minutes. == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * [https://www.visit-oita.jp/spots/detail/5485 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Spot Intypeation] Official Oita Prefecture Tourism Website (Tourism Oita) * [https://www.oishiimati-oita.jp/spots/detail/10 Takiō Hyakketsu Cave Tomb Cluster | Tourist Spot] Oita City Tourism Association == Distribution and Notable Cave Tomb Toional Historic site, 161 tombs == * {{ill|Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takio Hyakka Cave Tomb Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Ōita, Ōita|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōita, Ōita|qq=}}, Ōita) - Municipal Historic site, 75 tombs * {{ill|Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hasugaike Kofun Cluster|qq=}} ({{ill|Miyazaki, Miyazaki|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyazaki, Miyazaki|qq=}}, [[:en:Miyazaki Prefecture|Miyazaki Prefecture]]) - National Historic site == Related Articles == * [[Kofun period]] * [[Decorated kofun|Decorated Kofun]] == References == * Nagahara, Keiji (1999). Iwanami Japanese History Dictionary. Iwanami Shoten. * Yokohama History Foundation (2013). History of Cave Tombs. * {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|滝尾百穴横穴古墳群|version=98185626|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Kofun period]] [[Category:Corridor-type kofun]] [[Category:Completion tier 6]] }} [[ja:滝尾百穴横穴古墳群]] [[ja:大分市]] [[ja:蓮ヶ池横穴群]] [[ja:宮崎市]] [[ja:横穴墓]] [[Category:History of Oita, Oita]] [[Category:Kofun of Oita prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal Historic Sites in Oita Prefecture]] [[Category:Gunshūfun]] {{wikidata link|Q18338700}} [[Category:Wikidata no short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]
